name: Darien Service Plaza NB (I-95)
address: 1 Connecticut Turnpike E (I-95 Northbound, between Exits 11 and 12)
description: Rebuilt 24/7 Connecticut I-95 northbound travel plaza with Mobil gasoline and diesel, a food court (McDonald's, Subway, Dunkin, Starbucks, Auntie Anne's, Panera, Sbarro, Chipotle), Alltown convenience store, and separate car and truck parking.

name: Darien Service Plaza SB (I-95)
address: 1 Connecticut Turnpike (I-95 Southbound, near mile marker 9 between Exits 10 and 9)
description: 24/7 Connecticut I-95 southbound travel plaza with Mobil gasoline and diesel, food court (McDonald's, Subway, Dunkin, Starbucks), Alltown convenience store, restrooms, EV charging and separate car and truck parking.

name: Milford Service Plaza NB (I-95)
address: 1 Connecticut Turnpike E (I-95 Northbound, between Exits 40 and 41)
description: 24/7 Connecticut I-95 northbound service plaza with gasoline/diesel fuel, food (McDonald's, Subway, Dunkin, Sbarro), Alltown convenience store, restrooms, EV charging and separate car and truck parking.

name: Milford Service Plaza SB (I-95)
address: 1 Connecticut Turnpike S (I-95 Southbound, between Exits 41 and 40)
description: 24/7 Connecticut I-95 southbound service plaza with gasoline/diesel fuel, an expanded food court (McDonald's, Subway, Chipotle, Panda Express, Moe's, Sbarro, Carvel), Alltown convenience store, restrooms and separate car and truck parking.

name: Pilot Travel Center #255
description: Full-service 24-hour truck stop just off I-95 Exit 40 with 8 diesel fuel lanes, DEF, roughly 150 public truck parking spaces, 9 showers, public laundry, a CAT Scale and a Wendy's. The only major branded truck stop on this stretch of I-95.

name: CAT Scale at Pilot Milford
description: Certified CAT Scale at the Pilot Travel Center off I-95 Exit 40, southeast quadrant. Only CAT Scale on the southwestern CT I-95 corridor; the next ones are in Branford (Exit 56) and North Stonington.

name: Connecticut State Police Weigh Station (I-95 NB Greenwich)
address: I-95 Northbound, approx. Mile Marker 2 (near Exit 2)
description: Fixed CT DMV/State Police commercial vehicle weigh and inspection station on I-95 northbound near the New York state line, with quadruple static scales, a scale house and weigh-in-motion (WIM) screening.

name: Blue Beacon Truck Wash - Milford
description: 24/7 double-bay commercial truck and trailer wash off I-95 Exit 40 behind the Pilot travel plaza, offering exterior truck/trailer washing and trailer washouts.

name: Trans-Clean Truck Wash Inc
description: Commercial truck wash next to the Pilot truck stop at I-95 Exit 40, washing tractors, trailers, straight trucks and garbage trucks plus trailer washouts.

name: Bud's Truck & Diesel Service Inc
description: Full-service heavy truck and trailer repair facility near I-95 in Bridgeport offering 24/7 truck and trailer tire repair, service and heavy-duty towing; in business roughly 30 years.

name: Thompson Repair Road Service LLC
description: 24/7 heavy truck, semi and trailer tire repair and roadside service near I-95 Exit 30 in Stratford, with ASE-certified mechanics and towing available.

name: Bang's Towing
description: Established 1969, provides 24-hour heavy-duty towing and recovery for semis and commercial vehicles along the I-95 corridor through Bridgeport and Fairfield County.

name: New England Tractor Trailer Training School (NETTTS) - Bridgeport
description: CDL training school near I-95 in Bridgeport offering Class A and Class B commercial driver license programs with classroom instruction and behind-the-wheel driving.

name: Mayflower Motel
description: Family-owned trucker-friendly motel off I-95 Exit 40, next to the Pilot Travel Center, offering free trucker parking, guest laundry, pet-friendly rooms and discounted CDL/commercial rates.

name: Motel 6 Milford
description: Budget motel off I-95 Exit 35 in Milford with free self-parking that accommodates larger vehicles and truck parking.

name: Pilot Travel Center #255 - Truck Parking
description: Approximately 150 public and 37 reserved truck parking spaces at the Pilot Travel Center off I-95 Exit 40, the largest dedicated truck parking on the southwest CT corridor.

name: Darien Service Plaza - Truck Parking (I-95)
address: 1 Connecticut Turnpike (I-95 NB and SB service plazas)
description: Dedicated truck parking separate from car parking at both the northbound and southbound Darien I-95 service plazas, open 24/7 with fuel, food and restrooms on site.

name: Milford Service Plaza - Truck Parking (I-95)
address: 1 Connecticut Turnpike (I-95 NB and SB service plazas, between Exits 40 and 41)
description: Separate truck parking at both the northbound and southbound Milford I-95 service plazas, open 24/7 with fuel, food and restrooms on site.

name: TA Express New Haven (Branford)
description: Full-service truck stop at I-95 Exit 56 with roughly 75 truck parking spaces, 6 diesel lanes, and on-site TA Truck Service. Food options include Subway, Popeyes, and Starbucks.

name: American Auto Stop (Tinaco Plaza)
description: Independent 24-hour truck stop near I-95 Exit 93 close to the RI line, with about 120 parking spaces, 9 diesel lanes, 6 showers, laundry, trucker lounge, and food (Nathan's Famous, Johnny Pastrami).

name: Branford Service Plaza NB (I-95)
description: State I-95 northbound service plaza with a Mobil fuel station, Alltown convenience store, and food court (Dunkin, Subway and other quick-serve). Open 24/7 with separate car and truck parking.

name: Branford Service Plaza SB (I-95)
description: State I-95 southbound service plaza with Mobil fuel, convenience store, and food court. Open 24/7 with separate parking for trucks and passenger vehicles.

name: Madison Service Plaza NB (I-95)
description: State I-95 northbound service plaza with Mobil fuel, Alltown store, and food court. Open 24/7 with separate truck and passenger parking.

name: Madison Service Plaza SB (I-95)
description: State I-95 southbound service plaza with Mobil fuel, convenience store, and food court. Open 24/7 with separate car and truck parking.

name: North Stonington (Fairview) Service Plaza SB (I-95)
address: I-95 Southbound, Mile Marker 108 (near the RI line)
description: State I-95 southbound service plaza / Connecticut Welcome Center near the Rhode Island line, with Mobil fuel, convenience store, and food court. Open 24/7 with separate truck and passenger parking.

name: CAT Scale - TA Express New Haven (Branford)
description: Certified CAT Scale located at the TA Express truck stop at I-95 Exit 56 in Branford.

name: CAT Scale - American Auto Stop (Tinaco Plaza)
description: Certified CAT Scale at the American Auto Stop / Tinaco Plaza truck stop at I-95 Exit 93 near the RI line.

name: Branford Service Plaza NB Truck Parking
description: Dedicated truck parking at the Branford northbound I-95 service plaza, separate from passenger vehicle parking, available 24/7.

name: Madison Service Plaza SB Truck Parking
description: Dedicated truck parking at the Madison southbound I-95 service plaza, separate from car parking, available 24/7.

name: North Stonington (Fairview) Service Plaza SB Truck Parking
address: I-95 Southbound, Mile Marker 108 (near the RI line)
description: Dedicated truck parking at the North Stonington southbound I-95 service plaza / Welcome Center near the RI line, available 24/7.

name: Connecticut DMV Weigh Station - Waterford NB (I-95)
description: Fixed CT DMV commercial vehicle weigh and safety inspection station on I-95 northbound in Waterford, staffed by Motor Vehicle Inspectors.

name: Connecticut DMV Weigh Station - Waterford SB (I-95)
description: I-95 southbound weigh station site in Waterford; the scale house was demolished after a 2018 crash and enforcement is handled via roving portable-scale units. Fixed scale ramp remains at the location.

name: Motel 6 Groton
description: Budget motel just off I-95 and CT-349 that offers truck parking for commercial drivers and larger vehicles, near the Thames River and New London.

name: 160 Driving Academy - Waterford
description: CDL-A truck driver training school in Waterford near I-95, offering a roughly 160-hour (four-week) commercial driver license program.

name: One Source Towing & Repair
description: Family-owned 24/7 mobile and roadside heavy-truck repair with ASE-certified technicians serving the New Haven / I-95 corridor, including tire service.

name: CT Towing (New London)
description: 24-hour emergency roadside assistance and light, medium, and heavy-duty towing and recovery serving the New London / I-95 area including the Gold Star Memorial Bridge.
